title: Encanto
overview: A young Colombian girl must save her family's magical home when its enchantment begins to fade.

title: Turning Red
overview: A thirteen-year-old girl transforms into a giant red panda whenever she gets too excited.

title: Inside Out
overview: The emotions inside a young girl's mind guide her through a difficult move to a new city.

title: The Boy and the Heron
overview: A grieving boy enters a fantastical world guided by a talking heron in Miyazaki's return.

title: Minari
overview: A Korean-American family moves to rural Arkansas to start a farm in the 1980s.

title: Past Lives
overview: Two childhood friends reunite in New York decades after being separated by emigration.

title: Parasite
overview: A poor family schemes to become employed by a wealthy household with dark consequences.

title: The Farewell
overview: A Chinese-American woman returns to China under the pretense of a wedding to say goodbye to her grandmother.

title: Moana
overview: A young Polynesian navigator sets sail to save her people alongside a disgraced demigod.

title: Coco
overview: A boy accidentally travels to the Land of the Dead and uncovers his family's musical history.
